name: SaveSVG
description: Assembles SVG element strings into a complete SVG document (viewBox from canvas dimensions) and writes it to disk. File is only written when save_flag is True.

inputParameters.name: svg_code
inputParameters.description: SVG element string(s) to assemble (list or single string)

inputParameters.name: canvas
inputParameters.description: Rectangle geometry defining canvas width/height (optional; uses 800x600 default if absent)

inputParameters.name: file_path
inputParameters.description: Output file path including filename (e.g. C:\output.svg)

inputParameters.name: save_flag
inputParameters.description: Set True to write the file to disk

outputParameters.name: path
outputParameters.description: Absolute path of the written SVG file

outputParameters.name: svg_doc
outputParameters.description: Complete SVG document string (for inspection without saving)
